# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Prevent path traversal attacks by checking the requested file against a whitelist of allowed directories and files
$allowed_directories = array('uploads', 'documents');
$allowed_files = array('file1.txt', 'file2.pdf', 'file3.docx');

if (!in_array($_GET['file'], $allowed_directories) && !in_array($_GET['file'], $allowed_files)) {
    header("HTTP/1.0 403 Forbidden");
    exit;
}

// Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers
$file = $_GET['file'];
$path = 'uploads/' . $file;
if (is_readable($path)) {
    header('Content-Type: application/octet-stream');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . basename($path) . '"');
    readfile($path);
} else {
    header("HTTP/1.0 404 Not Found");
}
